question: How many people were killed in the attack on the Guarani-Kaiowa community in Douradina, Mato Grosso do Sul, in August 2024?
ground_truth: Eight people were killed in the attack.
event_desc: 3 August  Eight people are killed in an attack by farmers on members of the indigenous Guarani-Kaiowa community in Douradina, Mato Grosso do Sul.
